title: Neoarytera neoebudensis
taxonomy: Neoarytera neoebudensis is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Vanuatu. The classification of Neoarytera neoebudensis places it within the genus Neoarytera. This plant is a type of tree, and its classification is used in botanical studies to understand its relationships with other species. More research is needed to confirm the exact classification of Neoarytera neoebudensis.

intro: Neoarytera neoebudensis, also known as the Neoarytera tree, is a plant species native to the Pacific island of New Caledonia, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The Neoarytera tree is valued for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress.
